title: Macron Urges De-escalation in Middle East
content: French President Emmanuel Macron called on Israel to avoid expanding military operations along the Lebanon border.

title: Global Oil Prices Surge
content: Energy markets reacted sharply following rising tensions in the Middle East, sending global oil prices higher.

title: Nigeria Reviews Economic Forecast
content: Nigeria’s finance ministry is reassessing revenue projections after the surge in global crude oil prices.

title: Tinubu Nominates Oyedele as Minister of State for Finance
content: President Tinubu announced the nomination of Oyedele as Minister of State for Finance, awaiting confirmation.

title: Yobe APC Chairman Re-elected
content: Yobe APC chairman wins re-election during the recent party congress, consolidating leadership.

title: U.S. Raises Global Military Alert
content: The Pentagon has increased security measures at overseas military bases amid rising global tensions.

title: Cybersecurity Agencies Warn of Possible Global Attacks
content: Security agencies across multiple continents warned of potential cyberattacks targeting infrastructure and financial systems.

title: International Football Bodies Review Match Security
content: Football governing bodies announced enhanced security protocols for upcoming international fixtures.
